params.name: Flywheel Battery
params.description:
On Jun 19, 1996 AD, the concept of the flywheel battery was first proposed.
A flywheel battery is different from a traditional chemical battery, and it utilizes the conversion between kinetic energy and electrical energy. The flywheel battery has an electric motor that rotates the flywheel at high speed under the driving of an external power source during charging. During discharge, the motor operates in the state of a generator and outputs electrical energy to the outside under the drive of …
